narrative:
Cleveland Hts-Univ Hts City Sd city school district has 42,052 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 42.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 37.9 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +17.8% D−R vs +50.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
